name: Create and Edit Products
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can build and maintain your product catalog efficiently in "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":" through comprehensive product creation and editing capabilities, which support detailed product configuration including pricing, inventory tracking, and supplier relationships. This foundational product management functionality helps retail operators establish accurate product records that drive reliable POS operations, inventory management, and reporting across Australian retail operations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product creation and editing in "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":" enables retail operators to configure essential product attributes, manage pricing strategies, and maintain accurate product data that supports effective retail operations. Understanding mandatory fields and product configuration options helps ensure your retail operations establish reliable product records supporting accurate transaction processing, inventory tracking, and business intelligence across your retail operations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Products are the foundation of Retail Express. You can create products directly within Retail Express,  as well as use the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Using-Mass-Upload-to-create-products","children":[{"text":"Mass Upload"}]},{"text":" process to create products in bulk. You can also "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Duplicating-Products","children":[{"text":"duplicate"}]},{"text":" an existing product if required."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Edit Product ","bold":true},{"text":"window contains an extensive amount of information, as well as features beyond the standard editing of a product. For example, you can print labels, find Purchase Orders or even view a list of invoices for Allocated stock."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Create a Product"}],"data-id":"create-a-product"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To create a product individually:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to "},{"text":"Inventory > Create a product."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By default, "},{"text":"all existing products","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"newly created products","bold":true},{"text":" are set to "},{"text":"Disabled","bold":true},{"text":" unless the serial number option is explicitly updated."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"For more details on \"Master\" code used for products, usually the scannable product barcode or unique code provided by the supplier. If you have more than one barcode for your product you can enter additional barcodes on the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Using-multiple-product-barcodes","children":[{"text":"Barcodes"}]},{"text":" tab"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This field can be any length of characters, however, for compatibility with barcode scanners should only contain certain characters. Using lower case letters, spaces or any other symbols can cause issues in Retail Express.
